toolSpec.name: bitmap_set
toolSpec.description: Set the bit at offset to value.

toolSpec.description: Get the bit value at offset.

toolSpec.description: Count the number of set bits (1) in a range.

toolSpec.description: Find positions of bits set to a specific value.

toolSpec.name: hash_values
